AlarmDefinitions.AlarmDescription: Alert when Lambda p99 duration exceeds 25 seconds (cold start indicator). Threshold is 5 seconds below API Gateway 30-second timeout.
Alert when Bedrock throttles 5+ requests in 5 minutes. Indicates rate limit exceeded or quota issue.
Alert when S3 4XX errors (AccessDenied, NoSuchBucket, etc.) exceed 10 in 5 minutes. Indicates permission or configuration issue.
Alert when Lambda errors exceed 10 in 5 minutes. Indicates application or infrastructure failure.
Alert when API Gateway 5XX errors exceed 5 in 5 minutes. Indicates backend or Lambda failure.

DeploymentInstructions.Description: Deploy CloudWatch alarms using AWS CLI or CloudFormation
DeploymentInstructions.CLIExample: aws cloudwatch put-metric-alarm --alarm-name twin-lambda-duration-p99 --metric-name Duration --namespace AWS/Lambda --statistic p99 --period 60 --evaluation-periods 2 --threshold 25000 --comparison-operator GreaterThanThreshold --dimensions Name=FunctionName,Value=twin-api --alarm-actions arn:aws:sns:us-east-1:ACCOUNT_ID:pagerduty-topic
DeploymentInstructions.CloudFormationExample: See deploy.yml for CloudFormation template integration
Notes: Replace ACCOUNT_ID with your AWS account ID
Replace pagerduty-topic with your actual SNS topic ARN
Adjust thresholds based on your baseline metrics
Test alarms in dev/staging before deploying to production
